summary: Backend API Testing - Iteration 11 COMPLETE. 12/12 tests PASS. Detail fields feature (when_happens, who_affected, what_tried) verified working: POST /api/problems correctly saves detail fields, PATCH /api/problems/{id} correctly updates them, GET /api/problems/{id} correctly returns them.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ POST /api/auth/register - Returns access_token and user data correctly
✓ POST /api/auth/login - Returns access_token and user data correctly
✓ POST /api/problems WITH detail fields - All three fields (when_happens, who_affected, what_tried) saved correctly
✓ POST /api/problems WITH partial detail fields - Only specified fields saved, others null
✓ POST /api/problems WITHOUT detail fields - Works normally, detail fields are null
✓ PATCH /api/problems/{id} - Adds detail fields to existing frikt
✓ PATCH /api/problems/{id} - Updates single detail field without affecting others
✓ PATCH /api/problems/{id} - Updates title and detail fields together
✓ GET /api/problems/{id} - Returns detail fields if set
✓ GET /api/problems/{id} - Returns null for unset detail fields
✓ Detail fields persist correctly after PATCH (verified via GET)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native app - backend only testing requested)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefixes: 'test_detail_', 'test_create_', 'test_update_', 'test_get_', 'test_getnull_', 'test_persist_'. Test frikts created with and without detail fields for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Detail fields feature verified working. Key test scenarios: 1) Create frikt with all detail fields → verify saved, 2) Create frikt with partial detail fields → verify only specified saved, 3) Create frikt without detail fields → verify null, 4) PATCH to add detail fields → verify persisted, 5) PATCH single field → verify others unchanged, 6) GET returns detail fields correctly. Frontend is React Native (Expo) - cannot be tested via browser.

features_verified.auth_register: PASS - POST /api/auth/register returns access_token and user data
features_verified.auth_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns access_token and user data
features_verified.create_frikt_with_details: PASS - POST /api/problems saves when_happens, who_affected, what_tried
features_verified.create_frikt_partial_details: PASS - POST /api/problems with partial fields works correctly
features_verified.create_frikt_no_details: PASS - POST /api/problems without detail fields works normally
features_verified.patch_single_detail: PASS - PATCH /api/problems/{id} updates single field without affecting others
features_verified.patch_title_and_details: PASS - PATCH /api/problems/{id} updates title and details together
features_verified.get_with_details: PASS - GET /api/problems/{id} returns detail fields if set
features_verified.get_without_details: PASS - GET /api/problems/{id} returns null for unset fields
features_verified.detail_persistence: PASS - Detail fields persist after PATCH (verified via GET)

notes: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. Frontend testing via Playwright is not possible. The detail fields feature (when_happens, who_affected, what_tried) has been verified working through comprehensive backend API tests. Note: The update endpoint is PATCH /api/problems/{id}, NOT PUT.
